title: Pickleball and Pool Time with the Pals
summary:
The last stop on the calendar for the month of March was to meet up with my friends from Missoula for our third annual trip to St. George for some biking, climbing and pickleballing. We spent most mornings bouldering at Moe's Valley before sheltering from the afternoon heat at the AirBnB's pool where we were staying. In the evenings, we mountain biked, cooked dinners and spent lots of quality time together. A few highlights for me were:
  1. Riding the Barrel and Zen mountain bike trails with our entire group of friends
  2. Hiking/scrambling the Island in the Sky traverse with Helen and a few other friends
  3. Getting VERY into playing pickleball at the courts near the AirBnB


-Colin
